info.title: Sourcebot Public API
info.description: OpenAPI description for the public Sourcebot REST endpoints used for search, repository listing, and file browsing. Authentication is instance-dependent: API keys are the standard integration mechanism, OAuth bearer tokens are EE-only, and some instances may allow anonymous access.

tags.name: Search & Navigation
tags.description: Code search and symbol navigation endpoints.

tags.name: Git
tags.description: Git history, diff, and file content endpoints.

tags.name: Enterprise (EE)
tags.description: Enterprise endpoints for user management and audit logging.

PublicApiServiceError.description: Structured error response returned by Sourcebot public API endpoints.

oldPath.description: The file path before the change. `null` for added files.

newPath.description: The file path after the change. `null` for deleted files.

start.description: The 1-based line number where the range starts.

lines.description: The number of lines the range spans.

oldRange.description: The line range in the old file.

start.description: The 1-based line number where the range starts.

lines.description: The number of lines the range spans.

newRange.description: The line range in the new file.

heading.description: Optional context heading extracted from the @@ line, typically the enclosing function or class name.

body.description: The diff content, with each line prefixed by a space (context), + (addition), or - (deletion).

hunks.description: The list of changed regions within the file.

date.description: The commit date in ISO 8601 format.

refs.description: Refs pointing to this commit (e.g. branch or tag names).

body.description: The commit body (everything after the subject line).

date.description: The commit date in ISO 8601 format.

refs.description: Refs pointing to this commit (e.g. branch or tag names).

body.description: The commit body (everything after the subject line).

bearerToken.description: Bearer authentication header of the form `Bearer <token>`, where `<token>` is your API key.

apiKeyHeader.name: X-Sourcebot-Api-Key
apiKeyHeader.description: Header of the form `X-Sourcebot-Api-Key: <token>`, where `<token>` is your API key.

post.description: Executes a blocking code search and returns all matching file chunks.

x-mint.content:
## Usage

The `query` field supports literal, regexp, and symbol searches with filters for repository, file, language, branch, and more. See the [search syntax reference](https://docs.sourcebot.dev/docs/features/search/syntax-reference) for the full query language.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of repositories indexed by this Sourcebot instance.

X-Total-Count.description: Total number of repositories matching the query across all pages.

Link.description: Pagination links formatted per RFC 8288. Includes `rel="next"`, `rel="prev"`, `rel="first"`, and `rel="last"` when applicable.

get.description: Returns the currently running Sourcebot version string.
Returns the raw source content of a file at a given repository path and optional git ref.

400.description: Invalid query parameters or git ref.

post.description: Returns the file tree for a repository at a given revision.

200.description: File tree for the requested repository revision.

400.description: Invalid request body or git ref.

get.description: Returns a structured diff between two git refs using a two-dot comparison. See [git-diff](https://git-scm.com/docs/git-diff) for details.

schema.description: The base git ref (branch, tag, or commit SHA) to diff from.

parameters.description: The base git ref (branch, tag, or commit SHA) to diff from.
parameters.name: base

schema.description: The head git ref (branch, tag, or commit SHA) to diff to.

parameters.description: The head git ref (branch, tag, or commit SHA) to diff to.
parameters.name: head

200.description: Structured diff between the two refs.

400.description: Invalid query parameters or git ref.

post.description: Returns all locations in the codebase where the given symbol is defined.
Returns all locations in the codebase where the given symbol is referenced.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of commits for a repository.

schema.description: Return commits after this date. Accepts ISO 8601 or relative formats (e.g. `30 days ago`).

parameters.description: Return commits after this date. Accepts ISO 8601 or relative formats (e.g. `30 days ago`).
parameters.name: since

schema.description: Return commits before this date. Accepts ISO 8601 or relative formats.

parameters.description: Return commits before this date. Accepts ISO 8601 or relative formats.
parameters.name: until

schema.description: Filter commits by author name or email (case-insensitive).

parameters.description: Filter commits by author name or email (case-insensitive).
parameters.name: author

schema.description: The git ref (branch, tag, or commit SHA) to list commits from. Defaults to `HEAD`.

parameters.description: The git ref (branch, tag, or commit SHA) to list commits from. Defaults to `HEAD`.
parameters.name: ref

schema.description: Restrict commits to those that touch this file path.

parameters.description: Restrict commits to those that touch this file path.
parameters.name: path

X-Total-Count.description: Total number of commits matching the query across all pages.

get.description: Returns details for a single commit, including parent commit SHAs.

schema.description: The git ref (commit SHA, branch, or tag).

parameters.description: The git ref (commit SHA, branch, or tag).
parameters.name: ref

400.description: Invalid query parameters or git ref.

get.description: Fetches profile details for a single organization member by `userId`. Only organization owners can access this endpoint.

x-mint.content:
<Note>
This API is only available with an active Enterprise license. Please add your [license key](/docs/license-key) to activate it.
</Note>

schema.description: The ID of the user to retrieve.

parameters.description: The ID of the user to retrieve.
parameters.name: userId

403.description: Insufficient permissions or entitlement not enabled.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a user and all associated records. Only organization owners can delete other users.

x-mint.content:
<Note>
This API is only available with an active Enterprise license. Please add your [license key](/docs/license-key) to activate it.
</Note>

schema.description: The ID of the user to delete.

parameters.description: The ID of the user to delete.
parameters.name: userId

400.description: Missing userId parameter or attempting to delete own account.

get.description: Returns all members of the organization. Only organization owners can access this endpoint.

x-mint.content:

This API is only available with an active Enterprise license. Please add your [license key](/docs/license-key) to activate it.
</Note>

403.description: Insufficient permissions or entitlement not enabled.

get.description: Returns a paginated list of audit log entries. Only organization owners can access this endpoint.

<Note>
This API is only available with an active Enterprise license. Please add your [license key](/docs/license-key) to activate it.
</Note>

schema.description: Return records at or after this timestamp (ISO 8601).

parameters.description: Return records at or after this timestamp (ISO 8601).
parameters.name: since

schema.description: Return records at or before this timestamp (ISO 8601).

parameters.description: Return records at or before this timestamp (ISO 8601).
parameters.name: until

X-Total-Count.description: Total number of audit records matching the query across all pages.

403.description: Insufficient permissions or entitlement not enabled.
